rulings.Case Title: NEAL H. KONAMI VS. JAYNE Y. YEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Req.'S For Admission And Req. For Deemed Admissions And Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 19, 2014, Line 3: DEFENDANTS JAYNE YEE and DAVID YEE's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Requests For Admission And Request For Deemed Admissions And Monetary Sanctions GRANTED in part and moot in part. Plaintiff shall provide a complete response to Form Interrogatory 17.1 within 10 days of notice of entry of order by personal delivery or overnight mail. Motion is moot as to requests for admissions. Sanctions GRANTED in the amount of $555. Prevailing party prepare order. = (501/PHA)
